title: Discussions on how to implement Government Policies with Long and Medium Term effects in Focus
description: The Director General of the Nigerian Maritime Administration and Safety Agency, NIMASA, Dr Bashir Jamoh, OFR in an engaging session at the Public Hearing on the 2024-2026 Medium Term Expenditure Frame
html:
The Director General of the Nigerian Maritime Administration and Safety Agency, NIMASA, Dr Bashir Jamoh, OFR in an engaging session at the Public Hearing on the 2024-2026 Medium Term Expenditure Framework (MTEF) and Fiscal Strategy Paper (FSP) organized by the Joint Committee on Finance, Appropriation, National Planning and Economic Affairs and Local and Foreign Debts.

 

He exchanged ideas with Zacch Adedeji the Executive Chairman of Federal Inland Revenue Service, FIRS and Sani Musa the Chairman Senate Committee on Finance at the session chaired by the Senate President Godswill Akpabio In an effort to attain optimal implementation of the Medium-Term Expenditure Framework and Fiscal Strategy Paper (MTEF&FSP) which will provide a comprehensive framework for 

prudent fiscal management and resource allocation.

 

All hands on Deck to ensure the success of the Renewed Hope Agenda of the President Bola Ahmed Tinubu, GCFR administration.
